name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual loading or preparation of the "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — no actual data loading logic, no file reading, no pandas/CSV parsing, and no connection to any real Kaggle dataset. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional implementation. There is no evidence of real data standardization or feature preparation either.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual data standardization/normalization implementation. The file is a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that only defines requirement criteria strings and stub functions (`load_dataset()` returns a dictionary with a string "loaded", and `build_transforms()` returns a list of strings). There is no real code using libraries like `sklearn.preprocessing.StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any other normalization technique applied to actual data features. The requirement for data standardization is merely listed as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` but never implemented functionally.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/elbow.jpg` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree (`results\figures\elbow.jpg`). Although the image content could not be read due to a provider error during evaluation, the file's presence confirms it was generated and saved. The elbow method is implemented in `src/model.py`, and the output file exists at the correct path `results/figures/elbow.jpg` as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement the K-means clustering algorithm. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual K-means implementation (e.g., no use of `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`, no custom K-means logic, no fitting of clusters, no centroid computation). The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a real algorithmic implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual cluster centers data. This indicates the file was not properly populated with real K-Means cluster centers from model execution. The trajectory evidence also confirms there is no record of the file being properly saved or processed with actual data.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png` exists in the workspace, but there is no evidence that it was created using **seaborn**. The source code files (`src/data_loader.py` and `src/model.py`) are not shown with their contents to confirm seaborn usage. Additionally, the trajectory evidence explicitly states that no steps related to seaborn initialization or customer segmentation plotting were recorded. Furthermore, the image file itself could not be read/verified due to an API error. There is insufficient evidence to confirm that seaborn was used to generate the visualization as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa utekelezaji wa dashibodi ya Dash katika mradi huu. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili mbili tu (`src/data_loader.py` na `src/model.py`), ambazo zote ni "placeholder" za msingi bila utekelezaji halisi. Hakuna faili ya `app.py`, `layout`, au `callbacks` inayohusiana na Dash. Faili za msimbo zilizopo hazina uagizaji (import) wa maktaba ya Dash wala utekelezaji wowote wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa zinazohusiana na uundaji wa dashibodi ya Dash.
